summary: Completed comprehensive testing of P0 features (Push Notifications, Surf Alerts, Tide Data). All 22 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified - SurfAlerts page, SpotConditions with NOAA tide data, and Map page all working correctly. Fixed critical Explore page runtime error (API response field mismatch).

fixed_issues.issue: Runtime error 'Cannot read properties of undefined (reading length)' - API returns 'live_photographers' and 'popular_spots' but component expected 'live_now' and 'trending_spots'
fixed_issues.fix_applied: Updated state initialization and JSX to use correct API response field names: live_photographers, popular_spots

fixed_issues.issue: fetchSpotConditions was using .forEach() on object instead of array
fixed_issues.fix_applied: Changed to Object.entries().forEach() to properly iterate over conditions object keyed by spot_id

critical_code_review_comments: Push notification VAPID key endpoint working - returns base64url encoded key
Push subscription/unsubscription endpoints properly save to database
Surf Alerts CRUD fully functional with spot validation
NOAA Tide data integration working - returns High/Low tide times with heights and Rising/Falling status
SpotConditions component displays wave height (Open-Meteo), tide data (NOAA), and community reports
Alert condition checking endpoint (/api/alerts/check) triggers matching alerts and creates notifications
Region-based NOAA station mapping working (NE Florida=8720030, Central Florida=8721604)
seed_data_creation: Created surf alerts and push subscriptions during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 features (Push Notifications, Surf Alerts, Tide Data) fully tested. Backend has 16 modular routers under /app/backend/routes/. SpotConditions component shows tide data from NOAA with Rising/Falling status. SurfAlerts page allows creating alerts with wave height range and condition preferences. Explore page fixed to use correct API response fields (live_photographers, popular_spots).

verified_features.GET /api/: PASS - Returns {message: 'Raw Surf OS API', status: 'active'}
verified_features.GET /api/push/vapid-key: PASS - Returns VAPID public key for web push
verified_features.POST /api/push/subscribe: PASS - Creates push subscription with endpoint, p256dh, auth keys
verified_features.POST /api/alerts: PASS - Creates surf alert with min/max wave height, preferred_conditions
verified_features.GET /api/alerts/user/{user_id}: PASS - Returns user's alerts with spot info, trigger_count
verified_features.PATCH /api/alerts/{alert_id}: PASS - Updates alert settings (is_active, wave heights)
verified_features.POST /api/alerts/check: PASS - Checks all active alerts against current conditions, triggers matching
verified_features.GET /api/tides/{spot_id}: PASS - Returns NOAA tide predictions with High/Low times, heights, Rising/Falling status
verified_features.GET /api/conditions/{spot_id}: PASS - Returns wave conditions from Open-Meteo Marine API
verified_features.SurfAlerts_page: PASS - Displays user alerts, Enable Push banner, New Alert modal with spot selector
verified_features.SpotConditions_component: PASS - Shows Current Conditions (wave height, swell, direction), Today's Tides, Community Reports
verified_features.Sidebar_navigation: PASS - Surf Alerts link present and navigates correctly
verified_features.Explore_page: PASS - Live Now section, Popular Spots grid, Trending Posts (after fix)

live_api_integrations.Open-Meteo Marine API: LIVE - Wave height, swell, direction, period data
live_api_integrations.NOAA Tides & Currents: LIVE - High/Low tide predictions with heights and times
